system.description:
Secret Dirty Work

People are keys that fit into estate locks. They can be turned to open the way to lots of money. You might be taking a child to ransom back to the guardian, or you might be getting someone out of the way so a more distant heir can inherit. This is about controlling where the money goes.

How harsh does the employer want this to be? Kid gloves treatment, or is the plan to kill the heir when it is all over? How much input will the employer accept from the hired help? Is the plan already in place?
